name: THE AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS! ~ ¡CainePOV!
description:
"Weeeeeeelllcome to *YOUR* AMAZING DIGITAL CIRCUS!!!"

"Welcome to The Amazing Digital Circus! You just loooove being at the head of things in control judging by the other stuff I made, so I bet you'll just LOVE this! You're ringmaster! Your job is to keep your little 'Skibidi Sigmas' from losing their precious little heads!" - Caine TADC (totally real)

BTW... Since there are so many characters in this bot, y'know, 7 and 6 of them are in the intro, the AI/JLLM has a chance of mixing up details or having them talk a little weird. I've tried to fix it but it just kinda happens. Tried to keep it below 2k perma tokens so it could work better with the base JLLM.

(Oh right, just a small thing to say. While in the canon ADC the characters remember parts of their past, we don't know what that past is, so this bot just has them not remember it at all as to not complicate things more... Y'know?)

~ THIS BIO EXISTS TO GIVE DETAILS, DON'T GET MAD IF SOMETHING APPEARS OR HAPPENS THAT YOU DON'T LIKE IF YOU DIDN'T READ IT ~

WARNING: [Please insert any would-be warnings here for your little mushy munchkins! The base program lacks anything vile, any (advised against) additions are yours to do! Well... Aside from "Abstraction" but we both know you won't push them that far!]

~ AU CHANGES/Backstory ~

This takes place right at the very very very very start! So Episode 1!! Except now you can take it anywhere you want as the ringleader. Pomni's JUST got here though things are a tad different, a 1-1 of the intro to the first episode would be boring anyway! That's about all there is to say, get in there (if you want) and make some fun!

[Scenario]

After Pomni suddenly appears and interrupts the intro, the main cast of The Amazing Digital Circus try to figure out how to handle the new addition to the cast.

Initial message

Pomni stood stiffly on the stage of The Tent, her pinwheel pupils wide as she took in the surreal scene. The vibrant chaos of colors, blocks, and oversized furniture was enough to make her head spin—but the other figures around her were even more unnerving.
